Acceptable Intake of nitrosamines — questions and answers

This page consolidates the agency questions and answers on nitrosamine acceptable intake (AI) values, in accordance with EMA/CHMP/13279/2017 Rev. 2 of December 2024.

1. What is the AI for NDMA?

The Acceptable Intake for NDMA is 96 ng/day. Marketing authorisation holders should reflect this limit in their control strategy and engage with the Quality Working Party where deviations are required.

2. How are AI values derived?

Acceptable Intake values are derived from carcinogenicity TD50 values using the Linear Extrapolation method as defined in ICH M7. See ICH M7 for the underlying framework.
